results.description: Compressed skill: removed verbose sections, inlined key Product/FAQPage examples, removed references file, cut from ~580 lines to ~75 lines

changes: Removed Initial Assessment, Core Principles, Validation/Testing, Implementation, Output Format, Task-Specific Questions, and Related Skills sections
Inlined concrete Product and FAQPage JSON-LD examples directly in SKILL.md
Added explicit Key Rules section for JSON-LD correctness
Added simple Workflow section (read HTML → identify type → extract → write)
Removed references/schema-examples.md (399 lines) — relevant examples now inline
